de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.hierarchy

Class TypeHierarchy

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.smt.hierarchy.TypeHierarchy

  • public class TypeHierarchy
extends java.lang.Object
    Represents the hierarchy of the Java reference types known to KeY.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructor and Description
      TypeHierarchy(Services services)

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods

      Returns the children of a sort s.
      java.util.Set<SortNode> getParents(Sort s)
      Returns the parents of a sort s.
      java.util.List<Sort> getSortList() 
      void print() 
      void removeInterfaceNodes()
      Removes all interface sorts from the type hierarchy.

    • Constructor Detail

      • TypeHierarchy

        public TypeHierarchy(Services services)

    • Method Detail

      • getSortList

        public java.util.List<Sort> getSortList()
        Returns:
        The list of sorts in the type hierarchy.

      • getArraySortList

        public java.util.List<Sort> getArraySortList()
        Returns:
        The list of array sorts in the type hierarchy.

      • getChildren

        public java.util.Set<SortNode> getChildren(Sort s)
        Returns the children of a sort s.
        Parameters:
        s - A sort s.
        Returns:
        The SortNodes containing the children of s.

      • getParents

        public java.util.Set<SortNode> getParents(Sort s)
        Returns the parents of a sort s.
        Parameters:
        s - A sort s.
        Returns:
        The SortNodes containing the parents of s.

      • removeInterfaceNodes

        public void removeInterfaceNodes()
        Removes all interface sorts from the type hierarchy. All sorts without non-interface parents become children of java.lang.Object. All other sorts are left unchanged.

      • print

        public void print()
